# select_points_near_points { #geost.spatial.select_points_near_points }

```python
spatial.select_points_near_points(gdf, point_gdf, buffer, invert=False)
```

Make a selection of point geometries based on point geometries and a buffer.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name      | Type                            | Description                                                                 | Default    |
|-----------|---------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| gdf       | str \| Path \| gpd.GeoDataFrame | Geodataframe (or file that can be parsed to a geodataframe) to select from. | _required_ |
| point_gdf | str \| Path \| gpd.GeoDataFrame | Geodataframe (or file that can be parsed to a geodataframe) to select with. | _required_ |
| buffer    | float \| int                    | Buffer distance for selection geometries.                                   | _required_ |
| invert    | bool                            | Invert the selection, by default False.                                     | `False`    |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description                                       |
|--------|------------------|---------------------------------------------------|
|        | gpd.GeoDataFrame | Geodataframe containing only selected geometries. |
